item_properties.script:
document.title='人事稟議';
var targetColor = '#ADD8E6'; 

var style = document.createElement('style');
style.textContent = [
    '.imui-form > thead > tr > th,',
    '.imui-form > tbody > tr > th,',
    '.imui-form > tfoot > tr > th {',
    '    background: ' + targetColor + ' !important;',
    '}',
    '.imfr_item_table_header {',
    '    background: ' + targetColor + ' !important;',
    '}',
    '.imfr_input_noframes[readonly] {',
    '    background-color: transparent !important;',
    '    background: none !important;',
    '    border: none !important;',
    '}',
    '[item_type="product_72_shape"] > div {',
    '    background-color: ' + targetColor + ' !important;',
    '}',
    '[item_type="product_72_label"] {',
    '    background-color: ' + targetColor + ' !important;',
    '}'
].join('');
document.head.appendChild(style);
